title: Arcadia, Lift off!
overview: A young bounty hunter is after Captain Harlock, but when they finally meet, things don't go as planned.

title: Lady Captain Leotard
overview: The Arcadia needs repairs, but a complicated part is needed. Tochiro knows of one man who make it, but that man lives on a planet ruled by the Illumidus.

title: Lullaby of the Battleship
overview: The Arcadia answers a distress call sent by a ship under attack by bandits.

title: The Cosmic Treasure Island Legend
overview: Searching for answers, the Arcadia visits a space station devoted to transmitting information.

title: Girl of the Ghost Ship "Sell"
overview: A cyborg found on a derelict ship is taken aboard the Arcadia, but crew's pity on the girl could be their undoing.

title: The Great Space fortress appears!
overview: The Arcadia is badly damaged and Tochiro is ill. But could his mad rantings be the ship's salvation?

title: X = Emeraldas
overview: Emeraldas has an unpleasant reminder of how she got her scar

title: Mother and Son of the Steel Plane
overview: After a trip to a planet covered in water, an explosion causes the full water tanks of the Arcadia to empty, forcing them to make an emergency landing on a planet made of metal.

title: Who is the Spy?
overview: An act of sabotage has damaged the Arcadia, and Kei has gone missing.

title: Snowfall in the Sea of Stars
overview: It's Christmas and all little Rebi wishes is to see her father again.

title: The Sound of Freedom's Bell Rings Out
overview: The crew of the Arcadia try to take much needed shore leave on a neutral planet. They are forced to leave because of the Illumidus' treacherous and destructive ways.

title: The Heart's Control, the Heart's Vessel
overview: Mr. Zone has built a ship that he is sure will destroy the Arcadia once and for all.

title: Riddle of the Golden Goddess
overview: The Arcadia encounters a strange golden ball of light that leaves La Mime terrified.

title: Riddle of the Glowing UFO
overview: The glowing golden ball continues to be a mystery, and Mr. Zone gains an armada.

title: 80 Minutes in the Sea of Death
overview: The Arcadia, again badly damaged, is forced to hide in the waters of an ocean planet where the pressure is so great it will implode the ship if they don't repair it in time.

title: The Cat Taken Aboard in Space
overview: Rebi sneaks a cat on board, an act which threatens to doom the whole ship.

title: The Great Sandstorm: Communication Impossible
overview: Rebi's cat breaks Tochiro's radio, sending him storming off the ship. Rebi, Tadashi and Dr. Ban go after him, and soon all four of them are stranded on a dangerous planet.

title: The Deliverance of Emeraldas
overview: Emeraldas has been surrounded by the Illumidus, and the only way to get the Arcadia there in time is though a dangerously radioactive part of space.

title: The Mystery of Planet Maicon
overview: Mr. Zone tricks Captain Herlock into the deadly grasp of a mad and murderous computer.

title: Open? The Gate of the Arcadia…
overview: Tochiro is ill, but Dr. Ban doesn't have the right chemical to test how ill the little man is. Kei risks travelling to an Illumidus-controlled station to get it.

title: Fight on, Tochiro, Until Life's End
overview: Captain Harlock is finally in site of his goal, but will Tochiro be there when he reaches it?

title: To our mother world Earth! Space hero eternally…
overview: Both Harlock and Mr. Zone have been given the Fire of St. Aqule, which one will triumph?
